ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the artist */,
  "year_of_birth" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the artist */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the artist */,
  "year_of_death" INTEGER /* Year of death of the artist */,
  "place_of_death" TEXT /* Place of death of the artist */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the artist (M, F, O) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Preferred nationality of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biographical information about the artist */,
  "movement" TEXT /* Art movement associated with the artist */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the artist record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the artist record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exhibitions" (
  "exhibition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exhibition */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the exhibition */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the exhibition */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the exhibition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exhibition */,
  "curator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the curator responsible for the exhibition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exhibition */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the exhibition record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exhibition record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the exhibition record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exhibition record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exhibition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exhibitions_curator_id FOREIGN KEY ("curator_id") REFERENCES curators ("curator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "curators" (
  "curator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each curator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the curator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the curator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the curator belongs to */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the curator record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the curator record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the curator record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the curator record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("curator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_exhibitions" (
  "artist_exhibition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist-exhibition relationship */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "exhibition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exhibition */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date the artist participated in the exhibition */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the artist in the exhibition (e.g., featured artist, guest artist) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the artist-exhibition record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist-exhibition record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the artist-exhibition record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist-exhibition record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_exhibition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_exhibitions_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_exhibitions_exhibition_id FOREIGN KEY ("exhibition_id") REFERENCES exhibitions ("exhibition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "catalog_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each catalog entry */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "exhibition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exhibition */,
  "entry_title" TEXT /* Title of the catalog entry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the catalog entry */,
  "page_number" INTEGER /* Page number of the catalog entry */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the catalog entry record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the catalog entry record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the catalog entry record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the catalog entry record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_catalog_entries_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_catalog_entries_exhibition_id FOREIGN KEY ("exhibition_id") REFERENCES exhibitions ("exhibition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, curator, admin) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the access log record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the access log record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artworks" (
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artwork */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the artwork */,
  "year_created" INTEGER /* Year the artwork was created */,
  "medium" TEXT /* Medium used for the artwork */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the artwork */,
  "current_location" TEXT /* Current location of the artwork */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the artwork record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artwork record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the artwork record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artwork record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artwork_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artworks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exhibition_artworks" (
  "exhibition_artwork_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exhibition-artwork relationship */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artwork */,
  "exhibition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exhibition */,
  "display_date" TEXT /* Date the artwork was displayed in the exhibition */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the exhibition-artwork record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exhibition-artwork record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the exhibition-artwork record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the exhibition-artwork record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exhibition_artwork_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exhibition_artworks_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exhibition_artworks_exhibition_id FOREIGN KEY ("exhibition_id") REFERENCES exhibitions ("exhibition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artwork_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artwork image */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artwork */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the artwork image record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artwork image record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the artwork image record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artwork image record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artwork_images_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artwork_conservation" (
  "conservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation record */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artwork */,
  "conservation_date" TEXT /* Date of the conservation */,
  "conservation_details" TEXT /* Details of the conservation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the conservation record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the conservation record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the conservation record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the conservation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artwork_conservation_artwork_id FOREIGN KEY ("artwork_id") REFERENCES artworks ("artwork_id")
)
